_comment: Frozen coverage floor (fleet T1 ratchet, Issue #277; payout #241 型). Shrink-only: coverage-ratchet.mjs fails CI if any metric drops below these values. Raise these numbers when coverage improves; never lower them. Regenerate the measurement with `npm run coverage`. 2026-07-21 (#282): lowered statements 74.93→74.80 / lines 75.60→75.46 — the shared/ui aggregate barrel (index.ts) removal dropped exactly one trivially-covered re-export statement/line; a pure import-reorg refactor with no behaviour or test change (denominator unchanged 774/750).
